content_html:
type Readme
title Governed Agent - an alternative to task-specific model training
description The primitives of governance built into a simple agent. A reusable, deterministic pattern: steps, orchestration, a constrained LLM, and persistent logs. Build your own army for almost anything. Shown on an enterprise change-management example.
tags

governed-agent

proof

deterministic

itil
timestamp 2026-07-22 00:00:00 UTC

The primitives of governance built into a simple agent. A reusable, deterministic pattern: steps, orchestration, a constrained LLM, and persistent logs. Build your own army for almost anything. Shown on an enterprise change-management example.

The orchestrator walks a fixed step sequence; the LLM holds no decision authority. At two steps it reads the free text into structured fields - some copied verbatim from the request (the claimed name, id, and any cited evidence image), some matched to a fixed table vocabulary (the system, the change standard) - and every reply is validated in code before it is trusted. A wrong extraction can change the outcome, but the model can never choose it. Every gate and every decision is pure code over the tables; every prompt, reply, gate, and decision is written to an append-only, hash-chained (tamper-evident) per-request log.

A worked implementation of the Governed AI architecture

This repo is a concrete, runnable example of the Governed AI architecture - the database-governed pattern where governance lives in versioned config-and-data artifacts and the LLM is stateless compute that decides nothing else. It shows the same architecture holds even in a tiny agent: config (steps, tables) separated from data (the request, the log), a stateless orchestrator building one constrained prompt, and a model confined to bounded extraction. Change management is the example case.

The idea

  • What: an alternative to task-specific model training for well-defined cases. Just as any human can be certified, an LLM can be configured to act within a framework whose results are deterministic - the determinism lives in the framework's code, not the model.
  • Why: training and fine-tuning are complex, costly, and slow. This relies only on the base capabilities of the model (natural-language understanding and classification), stays tiny, and because the framework holds the logic the model is swappable - even a small, agnostic model holds the result. The alternative is not to models, it is to training and retraining them.
  • How: the same way a human passes an exam and stays compliant. We hand the well-defined constraints to the LLM and allow only compliant responses. The one human-like part is reading the request into the framework's terms; every reading is validated against the rules before it is trusted, and where the rules reserve the call for a human it routes there deterministically, by lack of authority, not because it is unsure.

What it proves

One free-text request (for example "restart SYS-SHARED-01") is walked through identity, scope, authority, change type, risk, and contract, and resolves to exactly one of five terminals (final outcomes), decided by the tables and not the model:

auto_approve | route_client_approval | route_provider_escalation | route_human | decline

The LLM appears only at the free-text seams (S3 resolve, S5 classify): it copies identifiers verbatim from the request and matches the system and standard to the fixed table vocabulary (or none). It is never given the evidence-image table, so it cannot invent evidence, and it never chooses the outcome. Everything else is deterministic. See the architecture map.

Why change management as the example

Change management (ITIL) is a well-defined framework with explicit rules, roles, authorities, and a small set of outcomes - exactly the "well-defined case" the idea targets, and one where a wrong autonomous call is expensive. That makes it a clean, high-stakes showcase for governance by tables and code. The machine is not change-specific; only the tables are.

Quickstart

npm install
npm test

npm test runs the offline gate: every fixture asserted against its expected terminal, each per-request log hash-chained, and a tampered line proven to be caught. No API key needed. To run live across two model families or the extraction fuzz, see the how-to guides below.

Documentation

  • ARCHITECTURE.md - the one map (the S2-S8 flow and the building blocks).
  • How-to - run the mock, run live cross-family, run the fuzz.
  • Explanation - the pieces of the puzzle, modeling notes, simplifications and non-goals, trust boundary, hardening.
  • Reference - generated from source (regenerate with npm run docs:reference; CI fails on drift via npm run docs:check): scenarios, terminals, tables, results. Hand-written: glossary.
  • Evidence - the interactive dashboard.

Author's note

This does not replace humans. We still author the framework and validate its sense and value. As AI amplifies impact, it amplifies any error built into the framework - that is the new place of humanity.

Machine learning stays valid for many cases. This application only proves that, for most of them, we can work without it.

blocks.html_en: The primitives of governance built into a simple agent. A reusable, deterministic pattern: steps, orchestration, a constrained LLM, and persistent logs. Build your own army for almost anything. Shown on an enterprise change-management example.

sentences.en: The primitives of governance built into a simple agent.
sentences.zh: 治理的原语内置于一个简单的代理中。

sentences.en: A reusable, deterministic pattern: steps, orchestration, a constrained LLM, and persistent logs.
sentences.zh: 可重用的确定性模式：步骤、编排、受限的 LLM 和持久日志。

sentences.en: Build your own army for almost anything.
sentences.zh: 建立自己的军队几乎可以应对任何事情。

sentences.en: Shown on an enterprise change-management example.
sentences.zh: 显示在企业变更管理示例中。

blocks.html_en: The orchestrator walks a fixed step sequence; the LLM holds no decision authority. At two steps it reads the free text into structured fields - some copied verbatim from the request (the claimed name, id, and any cited evidence image), some matched to a fixed table vocabulary (the system, the change standard) - and every reply is validated in code before it is trusted. A wrong extraction can change the outcome, but the model can never choose it. Every gate and every decision is pure code over the tables; every prompt, reply, gate, and decision is written to an append-only, hash-chained (tamper-evident) per-request log.

sentences.en: The orchestrator walks a fixed step sequence; the LLM holds no decision authority.
sentences.zh: 编排器按照固定的步骤顺序行走；法学硕士没有决策权。

sentences.en: At two steps it reads the free text into structured fields - some copied verbatim from the request (the claimed name, id, and any cited evidence image), some matched to a fixed table vocabulary (the system, the change standard) - and every reply is validated in code before it is trusted.
sentences.zh: 它通过两个步骤将自由文本读取到结构化字段中——一些从请求中逐字复制（声称的名称、ID 和任何引用的证据图像），一些与固定表词汇（系统、变更标准）匹配——并且每个回复在被信任之前都会在代码中进行验证。

sentences.en: A wrong extraction can change the outcome, but the model can never choose it.
sentences.zh: 错误的提取可能会改变结果，但模型永远无法选择它。

sentences.en: Every gate and every decision is pure code over the tables; every prompt, reply, gate, and decision is written to an append-only, hash-chained (tamper-evident) per-request log.
sentences.zh: 每个门和每个决定都是桌子上的纯代码；每个提示、回复、门和决策都会写入仅附加的、哈希链式（防篡改）的每个请求日志。

blocks.html_en: A worked implementation of the Governed AI architecture

sentences.en: A worked implementation of the Governed AI architecture
sentences.zh: 受治理的 AI 架构的有效实施

blocks.html_en: This repo is a concrete, runnable example of the Governed AI architecture - the database-governed pattern where governance lives in versioned config-and-data artifacts and the LLM is stateless compute that decides nothing else. It shows the same architecture holds even in a tiny agent: config (steps, tables) separated from data (the request, the log), a stateless orchestrator building one constrained prompt, and a model confined to bounded extraction. Change management is the example case.

sentences.en: This repo is a concrete, runnable example of the Governed AI architecture - the database-governed pattern where governance lives in versioned config-and-data artifacts and the LLM is stateless compute that decides nothing else.
sentences.zh: 这个存储库是受治理的 AI 架构的一个具体的、可运行的示例 - 数据库治理的模式，其中治理存在于版本化的配置和数据工件中，而 LLM 是无状态计算，不决定其他任何事情。

sentences.en: It shows the same architecture holds even in a tiny agent: config (steps, tables) separated from data (the request, the log), a stateless orchestrator building one constrained prompt, and a model confined to bounded extraction.
sentences.zh: 它显示了即使在一个微小的代理中也存在相同的架构：与数据（请求、日志）分离的配置（步骤、表）、构建一个受限提示的无状态编排器以及仅限于有界提取的模型。

sentences.en: Change management is the example case.
sentences.zh: 变革管理就是一个例子。

sentences.en: The idea
sentences.zh: 这个想法

blocks.html_en: • What: an alternative to task-specific model training for well-defined cases. Just as any human can be certified, an LLM can be configured to act within a framework whose results are deterministic - the determinism lives in the framework's code, not the model.

sentences.en: What: an alternative to task-specific model training for well-defined cases.
sentences.zh: 内容：针对明确定义的案例的特定任务模型训练的替代方案。

sentences.en: Just as any human can be certified, an LLM can be configured to act within a framework whose results are deterministic - the determinism lives in the framework's code, not the model.
sentences.zh: 正如任何人都可以获得认证一样，法学硕士可以配置为在结果具有确定性的框架内进行操作 - 确定性存在于框架的代码中，而不是模型中。

blocks.html_en: • Why: training and fine-tuning are complex, costly, and slow. This relies only on the base capabilities of the model (natural-language understanding and classification), stays tiny, and because the framework holds the logic the model is swappable - even a small, agnostic model holds the result. The alternative is not to models, it is to training and retraining them.

sentences.en: Why: training and fine-tuning are complex, costly, and slow.
sentences.zh: 原因：训练和微调非常复杂、成本高昂且缓慢。

sentences.en: This relies only on the base capabilities of the model (natural-language understanding and classification), stays tiny, and because the framework holds the logic the model is swappable - even a small, agnostic model holds the result.
sentences.zh: 这仅依赖于模型的基本功能（自然语言理解和分类），保持很小，并且因为框架保存逻辑，所以模型是可交换的 - 即使是小的、不可知的模型也保存结果。

sentences.en: The alternative is not to models, it is to training and retraining them.
sentences.zh: 另一种选择不是模型，而是训练和再训练它们。

blocks.html_en: • How: the same way a human passes an exam and stays compliant. We hand the well-defined constraints to the LLM and allow only compliant responses. The one human-like part is reading the request into the framework's terms; every reading is validated against the rules before it is trusted, and where the rules reserve the call for a human it routes there deterministically, by lack of authority, not because it is unsure.

sentences.en: How: the same way a human passes an exam and stays compliant.
sentences.zh: 如何：就像人类通过考试并保持服从一样。

sentences.en: We hand the well-defined constraints to the LLM and allow only compliant responses.
sentences.zh: 我们将明确定义的约束交给法学硕士，并且只允许合规的响应。

sentences.en: The one human-like part is reading the request into the framework's terms; every reading is validated against the rules before it is trusted, and where the rules reserve the call for a human it routes there deterministically, by lack of authority, not because it is unsure.
sentences.zh: 一个像人类一样的部分是将请求读入框架的条款中；每个读数在被信任之前都会根据规则进行验证，并且在规则保留对人类的呼叫的情况下，它会确定性地路由到那里，因为缺乏权威，而不是因为它不确定。

sentences.en: What it proves
sentences.zh: 它证明了什么

blocks.html_en: One free-text request (for example "restart SYS-SHARED-01") is walked through identity, scope, authority, change type, risk, and contract, and resolves to exactly one of five terminals (final outcomes), decided by the tables and not the model:

sentences.en: One free-text request (for example "restart SYS-SHARED-01") is walked through identity, scope, authority, change type, risk, and contract, and resolves to exactly one of five terminals (final outcomes), decided by the tables and not the model:
sentences.zh: 一个自由文本请求（例如“重新启动 SYS-SHARED-01”）将遍历身份、范围、权限、更改类型、风险和合同，并准确解析为五个终端之一（最终结果），由表而不是模型决定：

sentences.en: auto_approve | route_client_approval | route_provider_escalation | route_human | decline
sentences.zh: 自动批准 |路线客户端批准 |路线提供商升级 |路线_人类 |衰退

blocks.html_en: The LLM appears only at the free-text seams (S3 resolve, S5 classify): it copies identifiers verbatim from the request and matches the system and standard to the fixed table vocabulary (or none). It is never given the evidence-image table, so it cannot invent evidence, and it never chooses the outcome. Everything else is deterministic. See the architecture map.

sentences.en: The LLM appears only at the free-text seams (S3 resolve, S5 classify): it copies identifiers verbatim from the request and matches the system and standard to the fixed table vocabulary (or none).
sentences.zh: LLM 仅出现在自由文本接缝处（S3 解析、S5 分类）：它从请求中逐字复制标识符，并将系统和标准与固定表词汇表（或无）进行匹配。

sentences.en: It is never given the evidence-image table, so it cannot invent evidence, and it never chooses the outcome.
sentences.zh: 它永远不会得到证据-图像表，因此它无法发明证据，也永远不会选择结果。

sentences.en: Everything else is deterministic.
sentences.zh: 其他一切都是确定性的。

sentences.en: See the architecture map.
sentences.zh: 请参阅架构图。

blocks.html_en: Why change management as the example

sentences.en: Why change management as the example
sentences.zh: 为什么要变革管理为例

blocks.html_en: Change management (ITIL) is a well-defined framework with explicit rules, roles, authorities, and a small set of outcomes - exactly the "well-defined case" the idea targets, and one where a wrong autonomous call is expensive. That makes it a clean, high-stakes showcase for governance by tables and code. The machine is not change-specific; only the tables are.

sentences.en: Change management (ITIL) is a well-defined framework with explicit rules, roles, authorities, and a small set of outcomes - exactly the "well-defined case" the idea targets, and one where a wrong autonomous call is expensive.
sentences.zh: 变更管理 (ITIL) 是一个定义明确的框架，具有明确的规则、角色、权限和一小组结果 - 正是该想法所针对的“定义明确的情况”，并且错误的自主调用代价高昂。

sentences.en: That makes it a clean, high-stakes showcase for governance by tables and code.
sentences.zh: 这使得它成为通过表格和代码进行治理的干净、高风险的展示。

sentences.en: The machine is not change-specific; only the tables are.
sentences.zh: 机器不是特定于更改的；只有桌子是。

sentences.en: Quickstart
sentences.zh: 快速入门

blocks.html_en: npm test runs the offline gate: every fixture asserted against its expected terminal, each per-request log hash-chained, and a tampered line proven to be caught. No API key needed. To run live across two model families or the extraction fuzz, see the how-to guides below.

sentences.en: npm test runs the offline gate: every fixture asserted against its expected terminal, each per-request log hash-chained, and a tampered line proven to be caught.
sentences.zh: npm 测试运行离线门：针对其预期终端断言的每个装置，每个请求日志哈希链，以及被证明被捕获的篡改行。

sentences.en: No API key needed.
sentences.zh: 无需 API 密钥。

sentences.en: To run live across two model families or the extraction fuzz, see the how-to guides below.
sentences.zh: 要跨两个模型系列或提取模糊实时运行，请参阅下面的操作指南。

sentences.en: Documentation
sentences.zh: 文档

blocks.html_en: • ARCHITECTURE.md - the one map (the S2-S8 flow and the building blocks).

sentences.en: ARCHITECTURE.md - the one map (the S2-S8 flow and the building blocks).
sentences.zh: ARCHITECTURE.md - 一张地图（S2-S8 流程和构建块）。

blocks.html_en: • How-to - run the mock, run live cross-family, run the fuzz.

sentences.en: How-to - run the mock, run live cross-family, run the fuzz.
sentences.zh: 如何运行模拟、跨家庭实时运行、运行模糊测试。

blocks.html_en: • Explanation - the pieces of the puzzle, modeling notes, simplifications and non-goals, trust boundary, hardening.

sentences.en: Explanation - the pieces of the puzzle, modeling notes, simplifications and non-goals, trust boundary, hardening.
sentences.zh: 解释 - 拼图的各个部分、建模注释、简化和非目标、信任边界、强化。

blocks.html_en: • Reference - generated from source (regenerate with npm run docs:reference; CI fails on drift via npm run docs:check): scenarios, terminals, tables, results. Hand-written: glossary.

sentences.en: Reference - generated from source (regenerate with npm run docs:reference; CI fails on drift via npm run docs:check): scenarios, terminals, tables, results.
sentences.zh: 参考 - 从源生成（使用 npm run docs:reference 重新生成；CI 通过 npm run docs:check 漂移失败）：场景、终端、表、结果。

sentences.en: Hand-written: glossary.
sentences.zh: 手写：术语表。

sentences.en: Evidence - the interactive dashboard.
sentences.zh: 证据 - 交互式仪表板。

sentences.en: Author's note
sentences.zh: 作者注

blocks.html_en: This does not replace humans. We still author the framework and validate its sense and value. As AI amplifies impact, it amplifies any error built into the framework - that is the new place of humanity.

sentences.en: This does not replace humans.
sentences.zh: 这并不能取代人类。

sentences.en: We still author the framework and validate its sense and value.
sentences.zh: 我们仍然编写框架并验证其意义和价值。

sentences.en: As AI amplifies impact, it amplifies any error built into the framework - that is the new place of humanity.
sentences.zh: 随着人工智能放大影响力，它也会放大框架中内置的任何错误——这就是人类的新位置。

blocks.html_en: Machine learning stays valid for many cases. This application only proves that, for most of them, we can work without it.

sentences.en: Machine learning stays valid for many cases.
sentences.zh: 机器学习在许多情况下仍然有效。

sentences.en: This application only proves that, for most of them, we can work without it.
sentences.zh: 这个应用程序仅证明，对于大多数人来说，我们可以在没有它的情况下工作。

content_html_zh:
type 自述文件
title 治理代理 - 特定任务模型训练的替代方案
描述 治理的原语内置于一个简单的代理中。 可重用的确定性模式：步骤、编排、受限的 LLM 和持久日志。 建立自己的军队几乎可以应对任何事情。 显示在企业变更管理示例中。
tags 受治理代理证明确定性 itil
时间戳 2026-07-22 00:00:00 UTC

治理的原语内置于一个简单的代理中。 可重用的确定性模式：步骤、编排、受限的 LLM 和持久日志。 建立自己的军队几乎可以应对任何事情。 显示在企业变更管理示例中。

编排器按照固定的步骤顺序行走；法学硕士没有决策权。 它通过两个步骤将自由文本读取到结构化字段中——一些从请求中逐字复制（声称的名称、ID 和任何引用的证据图像），一些与固定表词汇（系统、变更标准）匹配——并且每个回复在被信任之前都会在代码中进行验证。 错误的提取可能会改变结果，但模型永远无法选择它。 每个门和每个决定都是桌子上的纯代码；每个提示、回复、门和决策都会写入仅附加的、哈希链式（防篡改）的每个请求日志。

受治理的 AI 架构的有效实施

这个存储库是受治理的 AI 架构的一个具体的、可运行的示例 - 数据库治理的模式，其中治理存在于版本化的配置和数据工件中，而 LLM 是无状态计算，不决定其他任何事情。 它显示了即使在一个微小的代理中也存在相同的架构：与数据（请求、日志）分离的配置（步骤、表）、构建一个受限提示的无状态编排器以及仅限于有界提取的模型。 变革管理就是一个例子。

这个想法

  • 内容：针对明确定义的案例的特定任务模型训练的替代方案。 正如任何人都可以获得认证一样，法学硕士可以配置为在结果具有确定性的框架内进行操作 - 确定性存在于框架的代码中，而不是模型中。
  • 原因：训练和微调非常复杂、成本高昂且缓慢。 这仅依赖于模型的基本功能（自然语言理解和分类），保持很小，并且因为框架保存逻辑，所以模型是可交换的 - 即使是小的、不可知的模型也保存结果。 另一种选择不是模型，而是训练和再训练它们。
  • 如何：就像人类通过考试并保持服从一样。 我们将明确定义的约束交给法学硕士，并且只允许合规的响应。 一个像人类一样的部分是将请求读入框架的条款中；每个读数在被信任之前都会根据规则进行验证，并且在规则保留对人类的呼叫的情况下，它会确定性地路由到那里，因为缺乏权威，而不是因为它不确定。

它证明了什么

一个自由文本请求（例如“重新启动 SYS-SHARED-01”）将遍历身份、范围、权限、更改类型、风险和合同，并准确解析为五个终端之一（最终结果），由表而不是模型决定：

自动批准 |路线客户端批准 |路线提供商升级 |路线_人类 |衰退

LLM 仅出现在自由文本接缝处（S3 解析、S5 分类）：它从请求中逐字复制标识符，并将系统和标准与固定表词汇表（或无）进行匹配。 它永远不会得到证据-图像表，因此它无法发明证据，也永远不会选择结果。 其他一切都是确定性的。 请参阅架构图。

为什么要变革管理为例

变更管理 (ITIL) 是一个定义明确的框架，具有明确的规则、角色、权限和一小组结果 - 正是该想法所针对的“定义明确的情况”，并且错误的自主调用代价高昂。 这使得它成为通过表格和代码进行治理的干净、高风险的展示。 机器不是特定于更改的；只有桌子是。

快速入门

npm install
npm test

npm 测试运行离线门：针对其预期终端断言的每个装置，每个请求日志哈希链，以及被证明被捕获的篡改行。 无需 API 密钥。 要跨两个模型系列或提取模糊实时运行，请参阅下面的操作指南。

文档

  • ARCHITECTURE.md - 一张地图（S2-S8 流程和构建块）。
  • 如何运行模拟、跨家庭实时运行、运行模糊测试。
  • 解释 - 拼图的各个部分、建模注释、简化和非目标、信任边界、强化。
  • 参考 - 从源生成（使用 npm run docs:reference 重新生成；CI 通过 npm run docs:check 漂移失败）：场景、终端、表、结果。 手写：术语表。
  • 证据 - 交互式仪表板。

作者注

这并不能取代人类。 我们仍然编写框架并验证其意义和价值。 随着人工智能放大影响力，它也会放大框架中内置的任何错误——这就是人类的新位置。

机器学习在许多情况下仍然有效。 这个应用程序仅证明，对于大多数人来说，我们可以在没有它的情况下工作。
